_publications._publicationTitle: A Fibroblast-Derived Secretome Stimulates the Growth and Invasiveness of 3D Plexiform Neurofibroma Spheroids.

_contextSnippet: the pNF1s cultured in Fib-CM exhibited multicellular invasive outgrowths from pNF1 spheroids at day 1...We observed a significant increase in the number of invasive cells exposed to Fib-CM compared to CtrlM
details: Exhibited multicellular invasive outgrowths from spheroids at day 1 when cultured in fibroblast-conditioned media; showed significant increase in number of invasive cells compared to control media
